2384140.name: Luminous Skies: A Short Adventure
2384140.description:
A free-to-play turn based RPG that serves as a short demo. It is a fair gauge if you as a player may or may not want to pick up the full games. 

The main story is a short series of quests to help Anri recover an artifact.

Meet interesting people.

Recruit new party members.

Learn about your party members and the region you are exploring.

Explore the world and fight challenging turn-based battles.

Repeatable dungeons with harvesting and chest nodes that reset.

Play fun mini games.

Gather food and cook it.

Designed with widescreen monitors and laptops in mind

In addition to the base game, we have the following DLCs available:

Optimization DLCs: a free download for Luminous Skies: A Short Adventure and one for Interstellar and it is intended to be used on lower end operating systems.

The other DLCs are are effectively 2 games and 1 big expansion pack in a trench coat.

Luminous Skies: The Pilgrimage: A standalone game set prior to the events in A Short Adventure and Horizons.

Luminous Skies: Horizons: an add-on for A Short Adventure. It adds a many new quests, new encounters, new overworld zones, secrets, weapons and armors, and new party members. We hope to add additional content on a regular basis. Mainland and new world access has opened up for more exploration. If The Pilgrimage is a standalone game, Horizons is a standalone expansion pack.

Luminous Skies: Interstellar. Another standalone game, this time set in a Sci-Fi setting. Explore many worlds and contend with the Solar Regime and their plots to conquer all of known space.

Please refer to our announcements in the community section for further details on updates.

In some ways, these games have more in common with games of the 1980s or 1990s than those of the current year.

What are you waiting for? It's all out there for you to find and experience for yourself.

We do not use A.I. in our products.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
